action_set_definitions.name: get_resilience_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves detailed sub-tier dependency data for a specific supplier, including geopolitical location, Time to Recover (TTR), and Time to Survive (TTS) for each node.

supplier_id.description: The unique identifier of the supplier (e.g., 'NV-99').

action_set_definitions.name: apply_sourcing_mitigation
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a sourcing action (e.g., multi-sourcing, inventory buffering) to mitigate identified supply chain vulnerabilities.

supplier_id.description: The unique identifier of the supplier.

target_node_id.description: The ID of the vulnerable sub-tier dependency node.

mitigation_strategy.description: The type of action to take to reconcile TTR/TTS.

action_set_definitions.name: get_scoring_registry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current evaluation scores and Risk Exposure Index for a specific supplier.

supplier_id.description: The unique identifier of the supplier.

action_set_definitions.name: update_supplier_scoring
action_set_definitions.description: Updates a specific category score or index in the scoring registry for a supplier.

supplier_id.description: The unique identifier of the supplier.

new_value.description: The updated score or index value.

action_set_definitions.name: set_workflow_status
action_set_definitions.description: Transitions the evaluation workflow to a new status.

supplier_id.description: The ID of the supplier associated with the workflow.

status.description: The target status for the workflow.

state_description.suppliers: A list of objects containing supplier profiles, including ID, name, and baseline performance data.
state_description.evaluation_criteria: Key-value pairs defining the scoring categories (e.g., quality, delivery, cost) and their respective weights.
state_description.scoring_registry: The current ledger of assigned scores for each supplier across different categories.
state_description.workflow_status: The current stage of the evaluation process (e.g., 'data_collection', 'scoring_active', 'final_review', 'completed').
state_description.audit_logs: A history of state-changing actions performed during the evaluation session.

audit_logs: Supplier self-assessment for NV-99 uploaded to system.
Preliminary scores generated based on unverified 'Paper-BCP' documentation.
Geopolitical risk alert flagged for East-Sector maritime routes.
